task_description: Implement token-by-token streaming for AI chat responses over WebSocket. Stream Gemini responses as they generate instead of waiting for full completion, making the UX feel instant.

verification.summary: pnpm lint passes. pnpm build succeeds. pytest passes 38/38 on test_websocket.py + test_agents.py. Review v2 fixes applied: contextvar-based streaming (no specialist code changes needed, no singleton race), JSON-mode calls excluded from auto-streaming, orphaned streaming state fixed on WebSocket close.
